title: [Skyship, The Pits]
description: The area's floor is a series of cages, their tops made from a thick metal grating with bars close enough to allow traversal, but open enough to allow air and liquid to pass through.  The cage interiors are bright, lit by pale blue-white lights from unseen sources revealing solid stone floors covered with extensive blood stains and splattered with bits of dried viscera.  Runic symbols drawn with cloudy white wax are also visible on the cage bottoms.
